scope: backend/data-contract proof only; no frontend UI and no broad automation

summary.purpose_gates: Purpose-fit decisions are now used in source ranking, abstract evidence generation, atom promotion, compatible atom clustering, and graph/readiness evaluation.
summary.relationship_density: The deterministic core fixture now creates typed support, contradiction, qualification, definition, and scope-difference relationship evidence.
summary.atlas_trace: Atlas-safe trace previews include relationship type, connection reason, cluster maturity, purpose-match status, and evidence decision without private IDs or raw quotes.
summary.acceptance: The regenerated fixture meets all numeric acceptance targets for the deterministic proof scope.

purpose_gate_findings: Source ranking annotates purpose_match_status, purpose_gate_decision, and purpose_gate_reason.
Source ranking rejects hard purpose mismatches for purpose-specific queries.
Abstract evidence skips source-level hard mismatches and moves claim-level mismatches into rejected evidence.
Atom promotion and clustering can enforce purpose gates before graph promotion.
atom_clustering_findings: Clustered maturity is preserved during repeated atom merges.
Regenerated fixture has 6 multi-claim atoms and 4 clustered atoms.
Purpose-mismatched claims do not promote into atoms when enforcement is enabled.
relationship_density_findings: Deterministic proof edges cover support, contradiction, qualification, definition, and scope-difference.
Regenerated fixture has 10 relationships for 15 claims.
Orphan claims and orphan atoms are both zero.
atlas_frontend_readiness_notes: Atlas-safe previews now include relationship_type and relationship_types.
Previews include why_connected, why_clustered, purpose_match_status, evidence_decision, and atom_cluster_maturity.
Public-safe boundaries remain intact; no raw quotes, private IDs, prompts, local paths, or hidden notes are exposed.

local_model_readiness.notes: Deterministic proof is mock-safe and local-model outputs can now be purpose-gated, but arbitrary live Ollama source runs remain unproven.

paid_api_readiness.notes: No paid provider, cloud model, or escalation path was added.

top_blockers: Purpose gates are not yet enforced across every future live arbitrary-source path.
Relationship density is proven for the deterministic fixture, not arbitrary live research.
Relationship type metadata is not yet a dedicated validated enum contract.

verification.command: python -m py_compile rge/modules/purpose_gating.py rge/modules/relationship_density_proof.py rge/modules/evidence_atoms.py rge/modules/atlas_trace.py rge/modules/cluster_reporter.py rge/modules/research_queue.py rge/modules/abstract_evidence.py tests/unit/test_purpose_gated_relationship_density_proof.py

full_verification.reason: No migrations, quote validation changes, source download behavior changes, safety auditor changes, or public card export schema changes. Atlas-safe preview changes were covered by targeted tests and full safety audit.

next_recommended_packets.title: Live/Arbitrary Source Purpose Gate Enforcement
next_recommended_packets.goal: Apply purpose gates to staged live discover/fetch/ingest/extract/link/build/detect paths.

next_recommended_packets.title: Relationship Type Contract Formalization
next_recommended_packets.goal: Promote relationship type metadata into a validated contract/enum and update typed graph tests.

next_recommended_packets.title: Atlas Cluster UI Readiness Pass
next_recommended_packets.goal: Consume the ready trace/metric fields in a minimal read-only Atlas preview state.
